ALSO PRESENT WERE ATTORNEYS HENRY HILL FOR PLAINTIFF AND VINCENT MILANI, FOR DEFENDANT. WITNESSES FOR DEFENSE INCLUDING RUDY DEGGER AND DR. LAWRENCE ELISON WERE ALSO PRESENT.
